title: Build React Native login and registration screens
goal: Create mobile authentication UI for logging in and registering User accounts.
implementation_steps: Create a login screen with email and password fields.
Create a register screen with name, email, and password fields.
Validate required fields on the client before sending requests.
Validate email format lightly on the client.
Require password length of at least 6 on register.
Show clear error messages from ApiError.
After successful login, navigate to the authenticated scanner/home route.
After successful registration, show success and navigate to login unless backend auto-login is implemented.
Add links between login and register screens.
ui_requirements: Mobile-first spacing and large tap targets.
Password field should hide typed password.
Error text should be visible without relying only on alerts.
acceptance_criteria: Seeded borrower can log in and appears as User.
Invalid credentials show a clear error.
Form cannot be submitted twice while loading.
